name: redaction-checker
title: redaction-checker: app-switcher and recents leak scanner
description: Verify sensitive screens are obscured in the iOS app switcher and Android recents thumbnail before backgrounding leaks them to disk. Maps to OWASP MASVS MSTG-STORAGE-9 / PCI. Runs locally with no account; Revyl cloud devices are an optional tier (opt-in for iOS, primary for Android). Claude Code integration: find sensitive screens, run, fix every FAIL, re-run until clean.
author: ethanzhoucool
